About.title: What is this website for?
About.description: The free <aip>Publication eAIP</aip> is now available as a basic version from Direction Générale de l'Aviation Civile (DGAC), but without a search function. Our site makes it easier to find airfields, but we do not accept any liability for the accuracy or timeliness of the AIP (Aeronautical Information Publication), as it is not operated by us. We only link to the respective approach charts.
